rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF DELORES OLLISON
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
rulings.Rulings: Continued 5/8/18. The following tentative ruling was posted for the 4/24/18 hearing, which has not been addressed: An amended petition that addresses the following issues must be filed prior to full review of petition: 1) Accounting must begin from date temporary letters were first issued; 2) Accounting is out of balance; 3) Schedules must either be on Judicial Council Forms or provide all information required in a standard accounting; 4) Entries in the accounting must be sufficiently described; 5) Supplemental Accounting is needed; 6) Cash has not been verified; 7) Proposed distribution must be specific; 8) Notice of Hearing has not been filed; 9) Proposed order has not been provided.
